focus: Rank out-of-the-box automated features across the full surface by reader and truncation-floor relationship

label: The context-engineering/memory layer has retroactive HYGIENE ops (memory:manage) but none refine source-doc data quality
Routing-metadata validators (advisor_validate, skill_graph_validate) exist but are orthogonal to doc DQI
The injection layer is a pure consumer with no quality feedback loop to source docs; the inject->refine loop is the one missing retrieval-class automation and PAYS the floor
Highest-ROI cheap wins are write-time floor-bypassing doc-quality gates reusing the half-built DQI scorer; retrieval-class automations stay hypothesis-until-prod-measured
Feature 1 (wire existing DQI scorer on-write + retroactive) is the single highest-ROI move: lever fully built, blind only by lack of wiring

direction: Treat memory:manage or advisor_validate as the doc-quality automation
reason: Both operate on the index/routing axis, not the source-document data-quality axis
